metadata.description: Kanban board for Low Stock Alerts with Configurable Thresholds. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.epicTitle: Low Stock Alerts with Configurable Thresholds
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Low Stock Alerts with Configurable Thresholds
tasks.description: Implement automated low stock alerts that notify users when inventory falls below configured thresholds per location.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want to receive alerts when inventory is low so that I can reorder items before running out of stock.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a store owner configures low stock threshold, when they set threshold (e.g., 5 items), then threshold is saved per location
Given inventory is updated, when quantity falls below threshold, then alert is triggered and notification is sent
Given low stock alerts, when multiple items are low, then consolidated alert is sent with list of low stock items
Given alert preferences, when store owner sets notification method (email, in-app), then alerts are sent via selected method
Given low stock items, when viewed in inventory list, then they are highlighted or marked with low stock indicator
Given alert is sent, when inventory is replenished above threshold, then alert is cleared
tasks.businessValue: Prevents stockouts and enables proactive inventory management. Improves customer satisfaction.
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement background job to check inventory levels. Use database triggers or scheduled tasks. Integrate with email service (SendGrid). Store alert preferences in database.
successMetrics: Alert accuracy: 100% of low stock situations trigger alerts
False positive rate: <5% of alerts for items that are actually in stock
businessRules: Low stock threshold is configurable per location
Alerts are sent once per day maximum (to prevent spam)
Alert is cleared when inventory exceeds threshold + 10% buffer
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
